title: Gun Unleashed
description: Adds a simple vanilla+ gun and gun painting to Minecraft
body:
Adds a gun to minecraft (cool)

![Gun sprite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0db4c157104e81dfd53df6ea03886b644220894f.png)

Gun adds a gun and a gun painting to Minecraft. This makes for better and more realistic scenarios in things like Hood RP or Ghetto RP without needing too much crafting, gun types, and ammo types like some other gun mods available. The current scope of the mod only contains one gun, the Flintlock Pistol, in its current scope. 

 <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/WyJgyIMnBew" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

You craft the gun with 2 planks of any type, 2 iron ingots, and a flint. The gun uses gunpowder and an iron nugget as ammo. The gun has 100 uses and a 5 second cooldown after firing. The gun also has its positioning in first and third person adjusted to look more accurate to how the gun should be held.

![Crafting recipe for the gun alongside some cool graphic designs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e82025a0013e1055bf04024f1dd62618338e13d0.png)

![A painting of a gun included in the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cdf6491cff32f3a5e58170eb2387f06e4b916da2.png)
